# Portuguese Estate

> Independent research on Portugal property investment for US, UK, and European buyers.

- Site: https://portuguese-estate.com
- Contact: info@portuguese-estate.com
- Markets: Lisbon, Algarve, Porto, Comporta, Cascais
- Focus: IMT 7.5% flat for non-residents (Sep 2026), AL licensing, Golden Visa fund route (€500k), rental yields, foreign buyer share
- Not a developer, not a listing portal

## Collections (scaffold — content publishing next)
- /guides/
- /projects/
- /areas/
- /compare/
- /developers/
- /news/

## Full corpus
